name: Haridwar Rishikesh Agra Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Haridwar, Rishikesh, Agra with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the h
itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Haridwar (260 KM
itinerary.description: Delhi to Haridwar (260 KM. 5-6 Hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Haridwar, check in at the hotel, Evening Ganga Aarti at Har-Ki-Podi. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast, proceed to Rishikesh & visit Lakshman jhula, Ram jhula, Triveni
itinerary.description: After breakfast, proceed to Rishikesh & visit Lakshman jhula, Ram jhula, Triveni ghat & drive to Haridwar & vehicle drop/Pick you at Har-Ki-Podi for walking tour. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Haridwar to Agra (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Haridwar to Agra (260 Kms. 7/8 Hrs. Approx.): Today After breakfast, proceed to Agra & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Delhi (250 Kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Delhi (250 Kms. 3/4 Hrs. Approx.): Today, after breakfast a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal & Agra fort & proceed to Delhi & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast, proceed to visit Red fort, India gate, President house, Lotus t
itinerary.description:
After breakfast, proceed to visit Red fort, India gate, President house, Lotus temple, Qutub minar and drop you at the airport/railway station.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours

Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Meals

All long distance Travels
